title: Thelypteris egenolfioides
taxonomy: Thelypteris egenolfioides belongs to the family Thelypteridaceae. It is a species of fern. The genus Thelypteris is a group of ferns native to tropical and subtropical regions. Thelypteris egenolfioides is often classified under the order Polypodiales. Its classification is further supported by its shared characteristics with other members of the family Thelypteridaceae.

Its leaves are said to have anti-inflammatory properties, making it useful for treating conditions such as arthritis and other joint-related issues. The plant is rich in health benefits, with its extracts exhibiting anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties, which can help alleviate conditions such as fever, wounds, and respiratory infections.
